pokemon:ducklett.name: Ducklett
pokemon:ducklett.summary: They are better at swimming than flying, and they happily eat their favorite food, peat moss, as they dive underwater.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: They are better at swimming than flying, and they happily eat their favorite food, peat moss, as they dive underwater.
These bird Pokémon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food--peat moss.
They are better at swimming than flying, and they happily eat their favorite food, peat moss, as they dive underwater.
When attacked, it uses its feathers to splash water, escaping under cover of the spray.
When attacked, it uses its feathers to splash water, escaping under cover of the spray.
They are better at swimming than flying, and they happily eat their favorite food, peat moss, as they dive underwater.

pokemon:swanna.name: Swanna
pokemon:swanna.summary: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.
Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.
Despite their elegant appearance, they can flap their wings strongly and fly for thousands of miles.
Despite their elegant appearance, they can flap their wings strongly and fly for thousands of miles.
It administers sharp, powerful pecks with its bill. It whips its long neck to deliver forceful repeated strikes.
Despite their elegant appearance, they can flap their wings strongly and fly for thousands of miles.
Despite their elegant appearance, they can flap their wings strongly and fly for thousands of miles.
Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.
